creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Where to find some of the best summer scents in London☀️

Atyab Al Marshoud is creating beautiful perfumes, blending heritage with modern elegance ✨ Their fragrances are known for their exceptional longevity⏳

Some of my favourites include:
🤍 Marshoud 4 White Perfume-a soft, musky-oudy scent, perfect for everyday wear
🌿 All Over Sprays with up to 24-hour wear (in Lychee and Salt)
🌸 Khisla Hair Mist in Pink & All in All-fresh and perfect for summer

A spot you don’t want to miss for the perfect gift or a little treat for yourself 🎁

📍Located a short walk from Harrods, @atyabalmarshoud Knightsbridge, 187 Brompton Rd

transcription.text: The hidden perfume spot in London you can't miss. Arteab and Marchute combines heritage with modern elegance. Their scents are long-lasting and perfect for layering. Some of my favorites include the soft Marchute for white perfume, great for everyday wear. I also love the all-over lasting sprays in lychee and salt, both with up to 24-hour wear. And the hair mist in pink and all in all with fresh and floral notes. Located right next to Harrods, this is a spot you don't want to miss for the perfect gift or a little treat for yourself.
